forced_review_triggers: tri-state signal change with dual decoupled consumers (approval vs checkpoint)
false-green and false-red both reachable if mis-implemented
rationale: Contained to 6 files / ~5 functions, but high-risk: the change carries a tri-state (None) through the Coach gate-evaluation chain that two consumers read with opposite required semantics. Phase 2.5B found a blocking gap in the naive design and a latent false-green from tests_failed=0 on the absent branch. Risk, not size, drives the 7.
